features.title: 系统层通知确认链路（Toast → confirm/cancel → Relay dispatch）

last_verification.summary: 2026-04-25 15:25-15:31 E2E 实测：Toast出现 → confirm按钮 → consume_pending_notification(trace_id+token校验+10分钟TTL+一次性take) → relay dispatch → 真实Claude Code进程(pid=44108) → progress回传 → session completed → result通知。日志证据：PROTOCOL: Confirm rejected (No pending) 当重放旧URL时，证明一次性消费有效。

features.notes: 验证文件：notification_manager.rs, protocol_handler.rs, commands.rs | 日志：C:\Users\29913\AppData\Local\cozmio\cozmio.log | action_log.jsonl 可追溯 trace_id → session_id → result

features.title: cozmio:// 协议处理（confirm/cancel action）

last_verification.summary: 2026-04-25 15:25:21 confirm_url=cozmio://confirm?trace_id=...&token=... 和 cancel_url 生成 | 15:31:36 重放旧URL被拒绝：PROTOCOL: Confirm rejected ... error=No pending notification

features.notes: protocol_handler.rs 实现 URL 解析和 action 路由，trace_id+token 双因子校验

features.title: Token 一次性消费（重放攻击防护）

last_verification.summary: 2026-04-25 15:31:36 日志：PROTOCOL: Confirm rejected ... error=No pending notification（重放旧 confirm_url 被正确拒绝）

features.notes: consume_pending_notification(trace_id, token) 做了 trace_id+token 校验、10分钟TTL、一次性 take() 消费

features.title: Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B Runtime Gate — Route A (sentence-transformers)

last_verification.summary: Route A (sentence-transformers) successfully loaded Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B from local path. 1024-dim embeddings generated for 8 texts. Similarity matrix produced. All vectors non-zero. Last-token pooling via official SentenceTransformer Pooling layer.

features.notes: model_path: D:/tmp/hf_cache_qwen3/models--Qwen--Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B/snapshots/97b0c614be4d77ee51c0cef4e5f07c00f9eb65b3/ | Pooling: pooling_mode_lasttoken=True | Raw output: verification/qwen3_raw_output.json (235.8 KB) | Semantic verification: localbox/relay_check=0.9477 (PASS), reminder/toast=0.9009 (PASS), continue/judgment=0.8346 (unexpectedly high), confirm/toast=0.8557 (unexpectedly high). Next: batch embed 100+ events + 20+ context_slices.

features.title: Real Memory Embedding Integration — Qwen3 Batch Embed + Recall Verify

last_verification.summary: 240 imported events + 29 context_slices with 1024-dim Qwen3 embeddings via sentence-transformers Route A. Metadata stored in DB (embedding_model, embedding_dimension, embedding_generated_at, embedding_text). 4 recall queries tested: Q1=0.71 (toast/CONTINUE), Q2=0.63 (Relay but not 树莓派), Q3=0.52 (abstract UX preference), Q4=0.55 (MODEL_ERROR hits). NOT marked as E1 — Real Memory Embedding Integration only.

features.notes: Script: cozmio/batch_embed_qwen3.py | DB: C:/Users/29913/AppData/Local/cozmio/memory/memory.db | Recall raw: verification/recall_results_raw.json | Gaps: user philosophy not in events, hardware-specificity weak, embedding concepts not in action_log window. Next: decide whether recall quality meets E1 bar.

features.title: Agent self-maintained memory flywheel — factual experience and feedback recording
features.verification_script: cargo test -p cozmio memory_consolidation && cargo test -p cozmio experience_recorder && cargo check -p cozmio

last_verification.summary: Task 2 final review blockers fixed. Automatic flywheel persistence now honors memory_flywheel_enabled for auto model-output agent_memories writes; focused test proves disabled gate writes neither experience_sources nor agent_memories. Relay early failure paths record factual mechanical experience events. Verification: memory_consolidation 9 passed; experience_recorder 4 passed; cargo check -p cozmio passed.

features.notes: Uses src-tauri experience_recorder wrapper backed by cozmio_memory AgentMemoryStore::insert_experience_source. source_ref values are mechanical and stable via sha256; raw screenshots are not stored. Config gate memory_flywheel_enabled defaults true; automatic flywheel persistence is disabled for experience_sources and auto model-output agent_memories writes when the gate is false. remove_or_supersede supports Task 1 supersede_memory when body/layer are provided and records memory_superseded; without body it records memory_rejected. Public apply_memory_operation routes through apply_memory_operation_command_path, and command-facing tests verify persisted feedback rows. Relay failure events cover unavailable/connect/dispatch/subscription/progress-stream failures with mechanical event_kind names. Runtime desktop UI/Tauri IPC/Relay process failure injection was not live-automated in this verification.

features.title: Agent self-maintained memory flywheel — consolidation agent path
features.verification_script: cargo test -p cozmio memory_consolidation && cargo test -p cozmio experience_recorder && cargo check -p cozmio

last_verification.summary: Task 3 consolidation path implemented. Packet builder includes recent experience_sources, related active memories, and current_hot_context field. Prompt builder includes required local-only boundaries and operation contract. Manual/dev runner records consolidation_runs, validates and applies multiple operations, records abstain as run result, avoids duplicate exact active memories, keeps superseded memories inspectable but not live-recalled, and creates hot_context_proposal drafts. Scheduler hooks added for feedback/outcome events plus throttled idle prompt-only runs. Verification: memory_consolidation 15 passed; experience_recorder 4 passed; cargo check -p cozmio passed.

features.notes: Because no reliable live consolidation-specific model/parser exists, automatic scheduler records prompt-only consolidation runs and memory-changing operations use run_manual_memory_consolidation with explicit validated operations. Production current_hot_context loading uses an empty fallback to avoid compiling stale human_memory.rs; injected non-empty hot context is covered in tests and Task 4 should provide the live hot-context source. Existing warnings remain; live Tauri IPC/runtime and full workspace regression were not run.

features.title: Agent self-maintained memory flywheel — Wide Stage (Memory Inspector/Privacy/Eval Replay/Procedure Recall)
features.verification_script: cargo test -p cozmio && cargo test -p cozmio --test semantic_boundary && node --check src-tauri/src/components/MemoryInspector.js

last_verification.summary: Tasks 7-10 completed and verified: Memory Inspector (supersede/run consolidation/apply hot context/replay traces), Privacy/Routing Inspector (route display/mode control/allowed material), Eval Replay (before/after comparison reports), Procedure Recall (procedure stats/use_count increment). All cargo tests pass (81 passed), semantic_boundary tests pass (2 passed), node --check passes. BLOCKER in Task 9 fixed: without_memory_preview now uses build_consolidation_prompt instead of hardcoded template.

features.notes: Task 7: MemoryInspector.js supersede/reject/consolidation-run/hot-context-view/apply-proposal buttons, source checkbox selection, replay_traces command | Task 8: memory_maintenance_mode config (default local), get_privacy_routing_status command, Privacy section in inspector | Task 9: build_replay_comparison_report with WITH/WITHOUT memory preview (fixed to use build_consolidation_prompt for both paths) | Task 10: get_procedure_recall_stats, increment_procedure_use_count, renderProcedureStats UI, use_count increment on procedure recall. All factual boundary data only — no semantic inference.
